content:
💡 terminal-use | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide AI agents with a functional, headless terminal environment to interact with command-line applications, enabling complex tasks like navigating file systems, running text-based games, or interacting with ncurses UIs.
✨ Key Features: • Headless virtual terminal for AI agents • Spawn interactive terminal apps • Read terminal screen output • Send keystrokes to terminal applications • No GUI, X server, or display needed
📖 Summary: terminal-use (`tu`) is a Rust-based headless virtual terminal emulator designed for AI agents. It allows AI agents to spawn and interact with command-line applications in a simulated terminal environment, enabling them to read screen output and send keystrokes without needing a graphical interface or X server.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
